items.title: 'It's personal': Why former workers want billionaire Gupta exiled from Australia

items.title: Flinders Island man fatally struck by police car consumed '18 handles of beer'

items.title: Tasmanian lawyer to replace Whish-Wilson in Senate

children.content: Vanessa Bleyer, a lawyer who has campaigned against the logging of native forests, has been elected to replace outgoing Australian Greens senator for Tasmania, Peter Whish-Wilson.

items.title: How did a 3km hike go so wrong? Retracing Celine Cremer's final steps

children.content: Belgian backpacker Celine Cremer was on the trip of a lifetime, but on a hike in Tasmania she left the trail and was never seen again. It took a private investigator, a YouTuber, loved ones and an army of volunteers to find answers.

items.title: Man charged after Molotov cocktail attack on OpenAI CEO's home

items.title: Beijing is shifting its Taiwan strategy. Here is why
